understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to navigate the character across each grid-based level to reach the goal gem tile marked `+` without landing on spike tiles, completing BP35 and then continuing through subsequent levels until the game is won, within the limited attempts and turn budget.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: On each turn I could MOVE_LEFT or MOVE_RIGHT; after any horizontal move, gravity automatically carried the character in the current gravity direction until it landed on a solid/support tile, hit a hazard (spikes end the run immediately), or reached the goal. CLICK could be used on breakable/clickable tiles (e.g., `x`) at a specified coordinate to remove them and open new fall paths, and CLICKs did not move the character. UNDO would revert the previous action. Planning relied on the state’s landing previews (left_landing/right_landing and corridor_scan) to choose moves that create useful vertical passages while avoiding spikes.
